description_long: This stuffed toy is designed to resemble a playful, cartoonish sea lion with a rounded blue body and a large, light blue snout tipped with a pink nose. Its face features large, expressive black eyes and small, rounded ears on either side of its head. The toy has two flipper-like arms outstretched to the sides, each marked with three white lines, and a frilled, pale blue collar around its neck. Its lower body tapers into a pair of flippered feet and a long, curved tail, all in a darker blue shade. The surface appears soft and plush, with a matte finish typical of fabric toys. The overall appearance is friendly and inviting, making it suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban environments like parks or playgrounds.
description: A soft, blue stuffed toy resembling a cartoon sea lion with a pink nose, frilled collar, and outstretched flippers. Its friendly face and plush body make it appealing and huggable.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round face, pink nose, large eyes, and outstretched flippers with white markings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the snout, the frilled collar, and the curved tail extending behind.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the frilled collar, and the two flippered feet and tail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile of the snout, ear, and the flippered limbs.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with wide, open eyes and a small, round pink nose giving a playful appearance. There is no visible mouth, but the overall look is inviting and happy.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both flippers extended outward and the tail curved behind the body. The head is held high, giving an alert and playful posture.
